cxu_object.claim: A bounce entry opportunity is detected when price drops sharply over three one-minute candles followed by two candles of stalling with very little price change indicating momentum exhaustion, at which point a long entry should be made at fifty to seventy-five percent of equity with a stop loss at five percent below entry and take profit at either ten percent gain or a return to the pre-drop peak whichever comes first

supporting_contexts.text: Pattern observed on ETH-USD 1-minute chart: price drops rapidly over 3 consecutive candles (each closing lower than open), then 2 candles show minimal body size (close approximately equal to open) indicating the sell pressure has exhausted. The bounce typically retraces 50-100% of the drop within 10-20 minutes. The pre-drop peak serves as a natural resistance level and realistic take-profit target.

Entry criteria: (1) Detect 3 consecutive red candles with total drop exceeding a threshold percentage. (2) Detect 2 subsequent candles where the absolute body size (|close - open|) is less than 25% of the average body size of the drop candles. (3) Mark the high of the first drop candle as the peak and the low of the last drop candle as the bottom. (4) Enter long at market. Exit at pre-drop peak or +10% from entry, whichever is lower. Stop loss at -5% from entry.

dropThresholdPct.description: Minimum total drop % over the 3 drop candles to qualify as a sharp dip

dropCandles.description: Number of consecutive red candles constituting the drop

stallCandles.description: Number of low-body candles indicating stalling/exhaustion

stallBodyRatio.description: Max ratio of stall candle body to avg drop candle body (smaller = tighter stall)

sizePct.description: Position size as % of equity for bounce entry

takeProfitPct.description: Take profit % above entry (or pre-drop peak, whichever is lower)

version.change_description: Initial bounce entry hypothesis based on observed ETH-USD 1m chart patterns — sharp drop + stall = bounce entry
